output_summary: Implemented signup form at apps/web-shell/src/presentation/components/auth/signup.tsx using getRegistrationSchema driven schema, react-hook-form and zod. Added skeleton, step indicators, and conservative zod mapping. No protected areas touched, no new dependencies introduced, no commits performed.
Received example JSON schema from user. Updated Zod mapping to prioritize JSON Schema properties and added email confirmation cross-field validation. No protected areas changed.

Applied Tolgee translations for labels (registration.<field>), standardized required error message to 'This field is required', added error border class 'border-destructive' on inputs and checkboxes, and appended checkbox link handling when schema description mentions link.
Added header and subheader rendering from schema / translations and updated multi-step indicator styling to match Figma (segmented rounded bar, primary highlight for current step).
